rationale: Item 19 reports actual Gross Sales distributions for all operating restaurants during Jan 1 - Dec 31, 2024. It does not use a pro-forma or illustrative cohort with different fee structures. The sales figures represent restaurants operating under the standard 4.5% royalty and 4.5% advertising rates (with some on reduced incentive rates). The current new franchisee rates (4.5% royalty, 4.5% advertising) match the rates that the vast majority of the reported cohort was operating under. Some restaurants in incentive programs (DIP, RTF, FTF) may have operated under lower rates, but the FDD reports actual sales — not pro-forma EBITDA — so the fee rate differential does not affect the gross sales figures themselves.
scorecard_note: Item 19 cohort comparability: no discrepancy found — Item 19 reports actual sales, not pro-forma with different fee structure.
